description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a beige fuselage accented by blue and red elements. The nose is rounded and painted red, featuring a prominent blue three-blade propeller. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, with blue tips and small cylindrical objects beneath, possibly representing armaments or fuel tanks. The cockpit is enclosed with a light blue canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be single-seat. The tail section is distinctive, with a split vertical stabilizer and blue-tipped horizontal stabilizers. The overall design is cartoonish and simplified, with smooth surfaces and minimal detailing.
description: A small, stylized beige airplane with blue and red accents, featuring a blue propeller, mid-mounted straight wings, and a split tail with blue tips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue three-blade propeller, red nose, and symmetrical mid-mounted wings with blue tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the enclosed blue canopy, cylindrical objects under the wing, and the split tail design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the split vertical stabilizer, blue-tipped horizontal stabilizers, and the open rear fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit canopy, underwing details, and the tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and blue-tipped ends; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Split vertical stabilizer with horizontal stabilizers forming a distinctive H-tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a light blue canopy.
